Author: Andrea
Name: MonstersMap
Punchline: Search and locate monsters on the map with ease.
Description: Find any monster in Eorzea! Enter a monster name and get instantly flagged on the map with a minimap icon showing the location. Perfect for hunts, gathering, or exploration.
Changelog:
-0.1.0
  Initial release
  Search monsters by name
  Place flags on map
  Minimap integration
